text.title: Tailwind Design Tokens Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is Tailwind major version known (3 or 4)?
Are opacity modifiers (e.g. bg-x/50) required for any colour token?

conclusion.verdict: apply with RGB channel colours and <alpha-value> syntax; safelist any dynamic classes.
apply: primitives in CSS vars, semantics in Tailwind via var(--token); dark-mode under data-theme.
block: refuse to generate config without a known Tailwind major version.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, Tailwind major = 3, opacity modifiers required → produce bundle per r3-rgb-channel-for-opacity; safelist dynamic classes per r5-safelist-dynamic.
